sections.label: Chorus
lines: Hon ding zong hi, hon ding zong hi,
A mangte Jesuh’n hon ding zong hi;
zong hi, hon ding zong hi,
A mangte Jesuh’n hon ding zong hi.

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Citakin a zong hi, sum mansuah nu in;
Leivui lak khuamial lak, lungkia lo-in.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: It tawntung a pa in, nuamna tangko hi;
“A mangthangsa ka ta, hong tungzo hi.”
